name: Blue Stretch Kick

name: Blue Style Mastery
power: Once per Combat, you may discard a card from your hand to stop a physical or energy attack. If that card is a Blue Style card, lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

name: Blue Style Mastery
power: All energy attacks you perform do +1 life cards of damage. All Blue Style energy attacks gain, "If successful, raise your anger 1 level."

name: Blue Style Mastery
power: All of your Blue Style physical attacks do +2 life cards of damage. During your "Defender Defends" phase you may remove any amount of Blue Style cards in your discard pile from the game instead of using a Defense. Prevent 2 life cards of damage from the attack for each Blue Style card removed.

name: Blue Style Mastery
power: (This is an MRP of the Trunks Saga Blue Style Mastery.) Your opponent must reach 6 anger to advance a personality level. All of your Blue Style attacks again "If successful, raise or lower your opponent's anger 1 level."

name: Blue Swift Dodge
power: Stops a physical attack. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

power: Endurance 1. Neither player may play more than 1 Setup each per turn. Neither player may play more than 1 Drill each per turn.

name: Blue Trunks' Energy Discharge
power: 5: Energy attack doing 17 life cards of damage. The next time this Combat that you put a Setup(s) into play by Augmenting, you may put an Energy Combat from your Discard Pile into your hand. Remove from the game after use.

power: (If Bon Para Para is your MP, your Allies with "Para Para" in the title may take control of Combat even if Bon Para Para is 2 power stages above 0 or higher.) Constant Power: Attacks performed by your personalities with "Para Para" in the title cannot be prevented.

name: Breakthrough Drill
power: Cards that end Combat may not be played or used while this drill is in play.

power: Sensei Deck. Cards that end Combat including Dragon Balls may not be played or used while this Drill is in play. This Drill affects all players.

power: Physical attack doing 6 life cards of damage.

power: All attacks cost +1 power stage to perform. All successful attacks do +2 life cards of damage.

name: Heroic Drill

name: Heroic Effort

name: Heroic Final Strike
power: Sensei Deck. Heroes only. Physical attack doing +2 power stages and +2 life cards of damage. If this attack is performed against a Villain, it does +4 power stages and +4 life cards of damage instead.
